message:
fix: add contributor auto-routing fallback to show/update/close (GH#2345)

resolveAndGetIssueWithRouting() and getIssueWithRouting() only checked
prefix-based routing (routes.jsonl), never falling back to contributor
auto-routing (openRoutedReadStore). Issues created via auto-routing were
invisible to bd show/update/close.

Add resolveViaAutoRouting() as a fallback when the issue is not found in
the local store or via prefix routing. This mirrors how list.go and
ready.go already use openRoutedReadStore for contributor-routed reads.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
